title: Delete dead frontend barrel indexes and verify staged deletions
description: Remove dead barrel index files and verify no dangling imports from previously deleted components

scope.in: Dead barrel index deletion, dangling import verification, unused CSS cleanup

dod.criterion: Zero dangling imports from deleted components
vite build and tsc --noEmit pass clean

tasks.title: Delete unused barrel index files
tasks.scope: Delete src/components/game/engine/index.ts and src/components/game/sprites/index.ts — both are barrel re-export files with ZERO external consumers (all imports go directly to submodules). Verify no imports reference './engine' or './sprites' as bare paths.

dod.criterion: No imports reference './engine' or './sprites' as bare barrel imports (grep verified)

tasks.title: Verify no dangling imports from deleted components
tasks.scope: Grep for imports referencing deleted directories (dashboard/, org/, projects/, sessions/, teams/, shared/SearchCommandPalette, prototype/). Remove any dangling imports found. Check globals.css for unused CSS classes that only applied to deleted components.

dod.criterion: Zero imports reference deleted component directories (grep verified)
No unused CSS classes for deleted components in globals.css
